title: Old District
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Old District''' was more commonly known as the "depths of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]" or "the underworld". It was a haven for the homeless and fugitives on Coruscant. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], it was also a haven to the [[Shamed Ones]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==History==
The Old District is believed to be the first development of Coruscant though some historians believe there was development further down.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Old Republic: Fatal Alliance]]'' {{Ab|The Old Republic: Fatal Alliance (audiobook)}}
